unreleased: Restored the on-screen indicator that shows when Fazm is controlling your browser; it was silently missing in recent releases due to a CI bundling gap

Fixed AI chat being cancelled mid-task when clicking another window during tool calls (Playwright, Terminal, macos-use). The conversation now stays alive while the agent is working; only explicit close (Esc, X button) ends it

changes: Improved the New Chat Window button: it now shows a count of open chat windows and renames itself contextually

Fixed agent loops getting stuck when a tool call timed out: the session now auto-interrupts on tool timeout (and skips the synthetic timeout when the tool already completed) so the next message goes through instead of hanging
Fixed pop-out chat windows showing new AI responses paired with the wrong question when a follow-up was sent while the previous response was still streaming
Added an App Management permission warning in the settings sidebar with a dismiss button, so you can spot when the OS denied the permission and silence the notice when you do not need it
Fixed: AI response in one chat could bleed into the next question after a timeout, causing the model to answer with a duplicate of the previous reply
Fixed repeated Claude account re-auth prompts caused by session reconnect flood after OAuth restart

Fixed pop-out chat windows freezing and the copy-on-hover button disappearing when multiple pop-outs were open. Each pop-out used to re-render on every streaming token from every other session; pop-outs now ignore updates that do not belong to their own session
Fixed crash on launch when popping out a new chat window
Strengthened agent instruction to never call bare python3 in Bash, preventing macOS Command Line Developer Tools install prompts
Added a Dismiss button with hover state and keyboard shortcut for closing prompts faster
Fixed unsent messages being lost when a paywall blocks a chat send. Your draft is now restored to the input
Fixed an error suffix being appended to empty AI messages, leaving you with a confusing standalone error
Fixed conversations being lost when a request errored mid-stream. The session ID is now persisted eagerly so the chat survives errors and restarts
Improved recovery from empty/zero-output turns: the bridge now forces a fresh session and shows a clearer notice instead of silently sending nothing
Improved session recovery so the next message after an error always re-sends the prior context, with clearer in-chat notices about what happened
Removed legacy Screenpipe and OMI rows from the Assistant settings page
Fixed the Vocabulary section in Settings not refreshing when assistant settings changed
Fixed duplicate pop-out chat windows when the global shortcut fires twice in quick succession
Fixed stale prior AI response showing under a paywall-blocked chat message
New pop-out windows (Cmd+Shift+N) now inherit the workspace of the currently focused pop-out instead of the global default
Fixed an intermittent crash on macOS that surfaced during heavy floating-bar and pop-out activity

Fixed rate-limit/credit-exhausted errors leaving sessions in a stuck state where the next message returned an empty response. The bridge now drops the ACP session on credit_exhausted and detects zero-output empty turns, recreating the session so follow-up messages reach Claude

Fixed mid-stream rate-limit warnings sometimes missing from the partial response bubble and from backend persistence. The error suffix is now appended before the partial-save runs, so backend, local DB, and UI stay consistent
Improved Fazm self-knowledge so the floating bar can answer common capability questions (what can it do, how to share screen, how to pay, voice control)
Improved voice transcription accuracy for product names and tech terms (Claude, Sonnet, Opus, MCP, Tauri, Supabase, etc.) by biasing Deepgram with a built-in domain vocabulary
Fixed Stop button in pop-out chat not clearing the loading spinner or "Not Responding" banner
Added a Vocabulary section to Settings to view, disable, and restore the built-in transcription terms
Restored the browser overlay that signals when Fazm is controlling a browser tab
Fixed duplicate error text appearing at the end of AI responses
Fixed timed-out and error messages not persisting after app restart
Added promo code support to the subscription checkout
Checkout now pre-fills your email address
Removed the Help Center link from Settings
Fixed Smart (Opus) model preference not persisting after app update — now correctly maps stored "opus" to the new ACP model ID
Improved workspace directory picker: Open button now reads Select for clarity
Updated Custom API Endpoint help text to mention local LLM bridges as an example
Fixed Stripe checkout cancellation redirect — returning to the app after cancelling a subscription checkout no longer shows an error page
Fixed paywall blocking users mid-onboarding
Fixed a bug where a revoked sign-in would make the app keep retrying in the background; now you are signed out so you can sign in again
Fixed model label showing "Smart" for Sonnet users when Anthropic reports a partial model list
Fix onboarding chat messages splitting into multiple bubbles when tool calls occur
Added custom MCP server support via ~/.fazm/mcp-servers.json with Settings UI to add, edit, and toggle servers
Available AI models now populate dynamically from the agent, so newly released Claude models appear without an app update
Added Referrals section to Settings with a $49 credit banner on the paywall
Upgraded Claude agent protocol to v0.29.2
Fixed follow-up messages not appearing when sent during a streaming response
Fixed AI responses occasionally splitting mid-word into separate bubbles
Updated default model selection and simplified model labels
Enlarged the chevron button hit area in AI response view
Paywall now triggers after 3 messages for all users, including built-in mode
Shortened free trial from 21 days to 1 day
Tightened privacy language in onboarding and system prompts to accurately say "local-first" instead of "nothing leaves your device"
Fixed AI responses leaking between pop-out chat windows when streaming simultaneously
Fixed onboarding chat splitting AI messages into multiple bubbles
Fixed duplicate AI response appearing in pop-out and floating bar when sending follow-up messages
Fixed pop-out windows not restoring after app update or restart
Fixed suggested replies persisting after starting a new chat
Fixed typing indicator flickering during network retries by adding a 600ms debounce
Added global shortcut (⌘⇧N) to open a new pop-out chat window from anywhere
Fixed duplicate AI response bubble appearing in pop-out window after sending a follow-up question
Added custom API endpoint setting for proxies and corporate gateways
Updated paywall to highlight full desktop control capabilities
Fixed founder chat crash loop on repeated rate limit failures
Added Manage Subscription button in Settings for Fazm Pro subscribers
Fixed error messages not showing in pop-out chat window
Fixed follow-up messages replacing previous user messages when sent during a stuck loading state
Upgraded ACP protocol to v0.25.0 with improved error handling for credit exhaustion and rate limits
Fixed onboarding silently failing when credits run out, now shows an error with options to connect Claude or skip
Fixed mobile web app failing to connect when desktop tunnel restarts
Fixed error messages not showing when Claude credits are exhausted
Added scroll-to-bottom button in chat when scrolled up
Fixed chat failing silently when personal Claude account lacks access to the selected model, now auto-falls back to built-in account
Fixed browser agent ignoring already-open tabs when navigating to websites
Fixed voice input silently failing when transcription times out, now shows error feedback
Chat observer cards are now auto-accepted (deny to undo) instead of requiring manual approval
Detached chat windows now restore automatically after app restart or update
Fixed stuck loading spinner when popping out chat to detached window mid-stream
Fixed detached chat window losing responses after the first query
Fixed AI agent accidentally typing its reasoning into user documents when controlling desktop apps
Fixed floating bar becoming a thin wide strip after hide/show with an error response
Added Smart/Fast model toggle in the chat header bar for quick switching between Opus and Sonnet
Chat header icon buttons now show labels as a floating hint below on hover instead of expanding the button inline
Fixed floating bar not starting a fresh chat after popping the conversation out to a detached window
Fixed chat view jumping around during AI response streaming
Added pop-out button to open chat in a separate window that behaves like a normal Mac window
Improved knowledge graph performance: capped visible nodes to 100, debounced updates, and replaced text rendering with lightweight textures
Added pop-out button to detach chat into a separate resizable window that continues the same conversation
Added pop-out button to detach chat into a separate resizable window that continues the same conversation
Made the default chat window 30% wider and 50% taller
Fixed floating bar overlay buttons (close and resize grip) overflowing outside the inner panel border
Added push-to-talk microphone button next to the send button in chat input
Fixed copy button causing layout shift when hovering over chat messages
Fixed send button and observer cards not visible in light mode
Fixed settings search to cover all settings across every tab
Fixed detached chat window not streaming AI responses
Fixed floating bar getting stuck in loading state when queries are enqueued while agent is busy
Fixed voice response not playing after using the mute/unmute toggle in the floating bar
Fixed transcription for non-English speakers — replacement rules now only apply to English and multi-language modes
Fixed font size setting not applying to chat messages, follow-up questions, input field, and UI elements throughout the app
Fixed high CPU usage caused by SwiftUI layout thrashing when Settings is open
Fixed orphaned ACP bridge process spinning at 100% CPU after app exit
Fixed session recording blocking cooperative threads during video encoding
Fixed detached window creating parallel sessions with floating bar instead of independent sessions
Fixed "Transcribing..." and voice input text being invisible in light mode
Fixed duplicate AI responses being sent to phone users
Redesigned paywall to show all upgrade options as equally visible cards with inline pricing
Fixed crash on Intel Macs caused by Sparkle framework code signature validation failure
Added Fazm Pro subscription with Stripe checkout and paywall for expired trials
Added voice response speed control with adjustable playback slider
Added welcome and safety introduction step to onboarding chat
Added animated glowing overlay when Fazm controls the browser
Added subscription status card in Account section
Added confirmation dialog when skipping onboarding and a Complete Setup banner
Added Chat with Founder tab for direct messaging with the Fazm team
Added TTFT watchdog to detect and recover from unresponsive AI sessions
Fixed Sparkle auto-updates breaking when Python MCP server writes cache files
Fixed a crash during app startup caused by SwiftUI re-entrancy in WebRelay
Fixed infinite retry loop when AI sessions encounter persistent errors
Fixed main thread blocking in orphaned cloudflared cleanup
Show updating spinner in sidebar and floating bar while Sparkle downloads the update
Voice response is now on by default with a mute button in the floating dialog header
Fixed built-in Claude not working for new users due to API key fetch race condition
Redesigned first-session tutorial to educate users about building personal software and automations
Added one-time claude_cli_credentials_detected analytics event when existing Claude CLI credentials are found at first launch
Added "Friends" as a discovery source option in onboarding
Added analytics tracking throughout the post-onboarding tutorial flow
Fixed remote control connection reliability: token refresh on auth errors, heartbeat re-registration, exponential backoff, and persistent tunnel registry
Added "Chat with our founder" button on paywall for a free month offer
Added "Refer a Friend" option to the paywall — share a link, get 1 month free when your friend sends 5 messages
Fixed Claude sign-in getting stuck when authorization step is missed — now shows a retry button
Added built-in Claude account option (Vertex AI) - no personal Claude sign-in needed
Added pin toggle (⌘P) to keep the floating dialog open when clicking away
Added Response Style setting for floating bar (Off/Soft/Strict) to control answer compactness
Added stop button and follow-up-while-streaming to floating bar
Chat persists when clicking away from floating bar; collapses to half-height semi-transparent preview and restores on focus
Replaced pin button with New Chat button in floating bar
Removed background style (solid/transparent) toggle from settings
Code snippets in floating bar are now collapsed to 5 lines with a quick copy button
Moved floating bar to bottom of screen — chat now expands upward
Post-onboarding tutorial now continues as a guided chat in the floating bar with 3 test prompts
Added Google Workspace integration — ask about your email, calendar, and files directly from the floating bar
Fixed exploration text blocks running together without line breaks
Improved exploration card with larger pulsating toggle button and inline loading animation
Added visible loading animation when transcribing voice input after push-to-talk
Fixed follow-up messages failing while AI is still generating a response
Stop button now stays visible during AI streaming and is colored red
Bundled mcp-server-macos-use binary inside the app for built-in macOS automation support
Screen capture and macOS automation now uses native accessibility APIs instead of browser screenshot
Fixed AI responses appearing concatenated without spaces when using tool calls or chain of thought
Added staging update channel for pre-release testing
Fixed memory crash during initial file indexing on large filesystems
Fixed Right Command push-to-talk triggering on Left Cmd and modifier combos
Optimized memory usage in file indexing service
Fixed floating bar horizontal jumps and screen switching on multi-monitor setups
Added copy buttons to messages and conversations in floating bar
Fixed plain text copying in markdown responses
Fixed orphaned ACP bridge processes on quit
Added escape key hint to floating bar close button
Added suggested reply buttons after AI responses in the floating bar
Improved update experience: shows helpful guidance when macOS blocks auto-updates due to App Management permission
Fixed chat getting permanently stuck after a temporary API error
Reduced default chat height by half and persist user resize preference across sessions
Fixed infinite retry loop when built-in credits run out — now auto-switches to personal Claude account
Fixed push-to-talk input being lost when clicking away without sending
Added Sentry error reporting to critical error paths (database, chat, audio, auth) for better production issue visibility
Added comprehensive analytics tracking: session duration, conversation depth, tool success/failure, floating bar response metrics, credit exhaustion, and onboarding start events
Raised collapsed floating bar position slightly for better visibility
Changed default push-to-talk key to Left Control for easier access
Added Sign in with Google and Sign in with Apple authentication
Follow-up chat input now wraps text like the initial input
Improved sign-in experience with branded browser page, deep link back to app, and auto-close of settings window
Fixed floating bar showing "Something went wrong" instead of re-prompting Claude sign-in when OAuth expires
Fixed "Fazm was prevented from modifying apps" privacy warning on launch
Added session recording for beta users (feature-flagged)
Added compaction indicator showing when AI is compacting context during long conversations
Improved session recovery to resume previous sessions after crashes instead of starting fresh
Fixed floating bar randomly starting a new session when switching between built-in and personal Claude accounts
Fixed floating bar losing session context when Claude re-authentication (OAuth) was required mid-conversation
Fixed a crash on macOS 26 caused by a window constraint feedback loop during AI response resize
Fixed main window not coming to front after signing in
Fixed crash during AI response streaming caused by overlapping window resize animations
Fixed floating bar window expanding beyond screen bounds during long conversations
Fixed SQLite syntax error when AI generates double-escaped datetime queries
Auto-retry update after granting App Management permission in System Settings
Bundled skills now update automatically when the app ships improvements — a brief toast notification appears when any skill is refreshed
Added Report an Issue button to the response header — icon-only with tooltip; flashes orange if AI is stuck thinking for 30+ seconds
Report issue button now flashes on startup if the previous session crashed unexpectedly
Fixed "AI service temporarily unavailable" errors caused by oversized screenshots accumulating in long sessions
Fixed Playwright screenshots exceeding API dimension limits on Retina displays
Fixed 401 auth errors not triggering re-authentication, causing users to get stuck with "AI service temporarily unavailable" errors
Screen recording now only captures when you're actively interacting with the app
Authentication now opens in Chrome instead of the default browser, so existing sessions are available
Added Home tab as default landing page with usage guide, floating bar toggle, stats, and recent activity
Fixed AI queries hanging silently when rate limit is reached — now shows sign-in prompt
API keys are now fetched from the backend instead of being bundled in the app binary
Renamed internal MCP server from omi-tools to fazm-tools and added diagnostic logging for tool calls
Claude account now connects immediately when switching to Your Claude Account in Settings
Added loading spinner when viewing CLAUDE.md and skill files in settings
Fixed noisy Sentry reports when no microphone is available, added retry logic and "No microphone detected" hint in Settings
Fixed issue where completing Claude sign-in would dismiss the popup without retrying the interrupted query
Fixed Claude sign-in window appearing off-screen on multi-monitor setups
Fixed chat messages disappearing and stale error button after browser extension setup
Fixed security issue: API keys are no longer bundled in the app. Authentication now uses per-user Firebase tokens
Floating bar is now draggable by default
Show full message text in recent messages instead of truncating, and added copy-to-clipboard button
Fixed phantom/ghost floating bar window appearing after closing with Esc
Fixed floating bar vertical position not restoring correctly in draggable mode
Fixed blank code blocks in floating bar chat and added syntax highlighting
Made recent messages scrollable with inline timestamps
Optimized AI response rendering to prevent app hangs during complex responses
Fixed crash when copying plain text from AI responses
Fixed voice input failing when API keys are not yet loaded on startup
Added Connect Claude button in floating bar when credits run out or auth is needed
Added Connect Claude button to floating bar for quick sign-in when Claude account is disconnected
Fixed app appearing unresponsive — now shows a "not responding" message and stops the agent after 60 seconds
Improved screenshot handling: captures screen earlier and stores more efficiently for better AI context
Replaced Google Workspace integration with a native Python MCP server for more reliable Gmail, Calendar, and Drive access
Improved browser extension setup window layout
Fixed Chrome opening to use the active profile instead of a new window
Fixed model not being applied correctly after resuming a previous session
Fixed false auth error detection causing unnecessary sign-in prompts
Reset Onboarding now also signs out, disconnects browser extension, Claude account, and Google Workspace
Fixed app showing as damaged after update due to invalid Python venv symlinks in bundle
Fixed post-onboarding tutorial not showing after resetting onboarding
Added Settings menu item (Cmd+,) and fixed window not reopening after close
Added AI browser profile — Fazm can now read your browser history and saved accounts to give smarter, personalized answers
Fixed Cmd+, shortcut and Settings menu item when no window is open
Fixed post-onboarding tutorial not showing after resetting onboarding
Fixed 401 auth errors on API keys by retrying with a refreshed token
Fixed crash caused by missing Highlightr resource bundle
Fixed app hangs caused by resource monitoring, sound playback, and update alerts blocking the main thread
Fixed microphone conflict with Wispr Flow and other virtual audio devices by preferring physical mics
Added 5-minute safety timeout to prevent stuck push-to-talk recordings
Improved feedback when voice input captures no audio
Fixed Sparkle auto-update URL so app correctly checks for new versions
Added browser profile import for existing users via floating bar dialog
Fixed crash on launch caused by missing Highlightr syntax highlighting resources
Added Explore Fazm resource cards on Home page linking to demos, safety, use cases, and comparisons
Replaced Talk to Fazm button-like badge with animated keyboard showing the active shortcut key
Observer cards now appear immediately in chat with accept/reject buttons and click feedback
Reduced observer response delay from 30s to 5s
Bundled Hindsight memory system — the AI now remembers context across conversations
Fixed floating bar not being draggable despite setting being enabled
Fixed crash caused by browser profile migration popup not properly cleaning up memory on dismiss
Smoother floating bar animations when expanding, collapsing, and switching between states
Added always-on screen observer for Gemini analysis that persists across app restarts
Fixed Google Workspace MCP not working for release-build users by creating venv at runtime
Observer cards now save immediately instead of waiting 5 seconds — tap Dismiss to undo
Fixed free trial users being incorrectly prompted to switch to personal account on temporary rate limits
Improved memory: Fazm now better understands when to use its knowledge about you from Hindsight and browser profile
Fixed browser profile and Hindsight failing on some machines due to bundled Python not finding its standard library
Observer AI now uses dedicated tools instead of raw SQL, fixing card creation errors
Browser profile now auto-extracts when queried for users who skipped the initial import
Fixed Hindsight Memory not starting on clean Macs (missing OpenSSL for embedded PostgreSQL)
Fixed typing indicator (bouncing dots) lingering after AI response completes
Fixed PTT audio level bars not animating when conversation history is open
Smart TV now auto-advances to the next YouTube Short instead of replaying the same one
Hide TV button now properly resizes the window instead of just hiding the TV area
Fixed floating bar window jumping back to full height after manual resize
Fixed new chat still remembering previous conversation context
Fixed false "Failed to get a response" error when AI used tools without text output
Fixed Connect Claude button not responding in floating bar when credits run out
Fixed Intel Mac support: skip Hindsight/PostgreSQL on x86_64, fix __dirname error in skills, improve Login Item error handling
Fixed a crash caused by a race condition in audio capture during rapid PTT toggling
Fixed Fazm silently showing desktop instead of app windows when Screen Recording permission is missing — now shows a clear error and prompts to re-enable the permission
Improved rate limit messaging — shows upgrade option when hitting Claude usage limits
Fixed UI freezes during AI response streaming
Fixed crash on macOS 26 (Tahoe) caused by 4K code signing page hashes — now uses 16K pages required by Apple Silicon on macOS 26
Fixed crash caused by leaked Swift task continuation in ACP bridge
Added automatic rollback when an update crashes on launch — restores the previous version and blocks the bad update
Added Voice Response setting — AI can speak its answers aloud using text-to-speech (Deepgram Luna voice)
Knowledge graph data from onboarding is now also saved to Hindsight for long-term memory recall
Added Discovered Tasks tab showing AI-identified tasks from screen analysis
Fixed Claude OAuth sign-in failing on first attempt when not logged in to claude.ai
Fixed Connect Claude button staying visible after successful authentication
Polished tool call status indicators: shows action verbs instead of technical labels, shortened file paths
Smarter task discovery: the screen observer now understands your context (profile, chat history, goals) and can query your data before suggesting tasks
Fixed screen recording capturing wrong window when multiple windows are open
Added screen recording permission prompt for beta users who haven't granted it yet
Added Remote Control settings section with QR code, connection status, and setup instructions for phone control
Fixed Google Workspace connection breaking after app updates
